geography: TX — DFW (Dallas/Tarrant/Collin/Denton) + Houston (Harris/Fort Bend/Brazoria/Montgomery) + SA (Bexar/Comal) + Austin (Travis/Williamson/Hays)
spine_method: NWFA TX certified installer directory + CTEF Certified Tile Installer TX + WFCA TX members + Carpet One TX dealers (cooperative) + Floors To Go TX dealers + Abbey Carpet & Floor TX dealers + CarpetsPlus COLORTILE TX dealers + BBB TX A+ accredited flooring + independent Google + city DBA/contractor filings
notes: TX has no general flooring-contractor license. NAICS 238330 is the federal classification. NWFA wood, CTEF tile, INSTALL Floor Covering apprenticeship, NAFCD are the cert/trade-association spines.

Cooperative buying groups (Carpet One, Floors To Go, Abbey, CarpetsPlus, ProSource) = independently-owned dealers under a co-op brand. Treat as independents unless ownership clearly rolled to corporate.

Active acquirers: Empire Today (route acquisitions), Floor & Decor (showroom rollups), Floorz (PE), Sherwin-Williams Flooring (captive), Bassett Flooring (PE). ETA/search-fund interest MODERATE-HIGH for SBA-financeable installers with recurring builder + commercial contracts.

Recurring revenue tells: production-builder install contracts, multifamily turn services, NFL/school district/HOA/HHA contracts, manufacturer warranty install programs, insurance restoration referral pipelines.

Coasting tells specific to flooring: no MeasureSquare/RFMS/QFloors, phone+email intake only, dated showroom photos (vintage carpet/tile samples), aging truck fleet, no online quote form, no design-visualization tool.
